title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: ST CHARLES BEND SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 2500 NE Neff Road Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 706-6729 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Cancer Screening Coordinator (541) 706-6729 Jessica Keegan [email protected] ScreenWise (971) 673-0581 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the Cancer Screening Coordinator to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - ST CHARLES MEDICAL CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST CHARLES BEND
